name: Паразит
description: Your patron is a cosmic parasite, draining the vitality of entire peoples and worlds. Upon forging a pact with such a patron, you become host to one of its nascent offspring. As you grow in power, the boundary between your identity and the parasitic larva within blurs.
shortDescription: Become One with a Cosmic Being

features.name: Spell Siphon
features.description:
Your patron has taught you to siphon magic from your enemies and make it your own. Immediately after a creature you can see within 60 feet of you casts a spell, you can take a {@action Reaction|XPHB} to force the creature to make a Charisma saving throw. The DC equals your spell save DC. On a failed save, that creature can't cast a spell again until 8 hours have passed. While this effect lasts, if the spell was at least level 1 and of a level you can cast, you have that spell prepared.

The maximum number of spell levels you can have siphoned at once equals 1 plus your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1). If you have the {@status Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or die, you lose all siphoned spells. When you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you lose all siphoned spells.

features.name: Physical Specimen
features.description: Your patron has enhanced your physical form to improve your utility as a host and pawn. As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, once per {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, choose a number of the following benefits up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one) that lasts until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB}, you can choose one of your selected benefits and replace it with another from this list.

details.hpIncrease: Your Hit Point maximum increases by an amount equal to your Warlock level.
details.darkvision: You gain {@sense Darkvision} with a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision}, its range increases by 60 feet.
details.poisonResistance: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@status Poisoned|XPHB} condition.
details.climbAndJump: Your jump distance is tripled, and you gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.
details.physicalProwess: Add your Charisma modifier to your Strength ({@skill Athletics}) checks or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) checks.

features.name: Symbiotic Sentinel
features.description: Your patron remains alert to threats to its host at all times. You can't be {@status surprised} and you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@action Initiative} rolls. You also have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@status Charmed} and {@status Frightened} conditions.

features.name: Spawn Pawn
features.description:
You always have the {@spell Dominate Person|XPHB} spell prepared. You can also cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to do so when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

In addition, taking damage can't break your {@variantrule Concentration|XPHB} on {@spell Dominate Person|XPHB}. When a creature succeeds on its saving throw, it takes Psychic damage equal to your Warlock level.

features.name: Larval Regeneration
features.description: When you die, a larval parasite emerges from your body. You control the parasite. The parasite uses the {@creature Rat} stat block but retains your Hit Points; Hit Point Dice; Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores; class features; languages; and feats. It can't cast spells.

details.burrowingPossession:
{@b Burrowing Possession.} As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, the parasite can target a Humanoid within 5 feet of it, forcing the creature to make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw (your choice) against your Warlock spell save DC. On a failed save, the parasite burrows into the creature, dealing Piercing damage equal to your Warlock level. While burrowed inside a creature, the parasite can't take any action, {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, or {@action Reaction|XPHB}, has Total Cover, and has Immunity to all damage except Psychic damage.

On each of the host creature's subsequent turns, it can use its action to make a Constitution saving throw against your Warlock spell save DC. On a success, the parasite is ejected into an unoccupied space of the creature's choice within 5 feet. If the parasite is still burrowed when the creature's turn ends, the creature takes Necrotic damage equal to twice your Warlock level. If this damage reduces the creature to 0 Hit Points, it immediately dies, the parasite disappears, and you take over the body as if targeted by {@spell Reincarnate} and rolled the species the Humanoid had been.
details.revival: If you are returned to life by other means, such as by the {@spell Revivify|XPHB} spell, your parasite immediately disappears.
details.uses: Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
